_comment: Human-readable titles for Siteimprove Alfa (sia-r*) rules. Source: https://alfa.siteimprove.com/rules/ and ACT-Rules community group.
sia-r4: Document has a valid lang attribute
sia-r5: lang attribute has valid BCP 47 language tag
sia-r6: Element with lang attribute has valid BCP 47 language tag
sia-r7: Element with lang attribute has correct language
sia-r9: meta refresh is not used for timed redirects
sia-r14: Accessible name of link or button matches visible label
sia-r15: iframes with identical accessible names have identical content
sia-r16: aria-required-attr role has required aria attributes
sia-r17: aria-hidden element does not contain focusable elements
sia-r18: aria attribute is permitted for element role
sia-r20: aria attribute is defined in WAI-ARIA
sia-r22: Element with aria-hidden is not in focus order
sia-r26: Video has audio description or transcript
sia-r30: Audio or video element does not autoplay with audio
sia-r31: Link in text block can be distinguished without color
sia-r38: Video-only element has transcript or description
sia-r39: Element with aria-labelledby has a valid accessible name
sia-r40: Tables are used for tabular data, not layout
sia-r41: Links with same accessible name serve the same purpose
sia-r42: Element in required WAI-ARIA context role
sia-r43: SVG image element has accessible name
sia-r44: Element in portrait or landscape orientation
sia-r45: aria-hidden element is not exposed to assistive technology
sia-r47: Text is not too small to read
sia-r48: Audio does not play automatically without control
sia-r50: Audio control is provided for background audio
sia-r57: Scrolling content can be accessed by keyboard
sia-r59: Element with orientation is not locked
sia-r62: Link in text block is visually distinguishable without color
sia-r67: Image is decorative or has accessible name
sia-r68: Presentational children of an element are not focusable
sia-r72: Element role is consistent with ARIA landmark
sia-r73: Text has minimum contrast ratio of 4.5:1
sia-r74: Link is distinguishable without relying on color
sia-r75: Form field error is identified and described
sia-r86: Focus is not lost after interaction
sia-r87: No unexpected context change on focus
sia-r90: Component with same name serves same purpose
sia-r91: Text spacing can be adjusted by user
sia-r92: Line height can be adjusted by user
sia-r93: Letter spacing can be adjusted by user
sia-r95: Element can receive focus via keyboard
sia-r111: Target size is at least 24×24 CSS pixels
sia-r113: Target size is at least 24×24 CSS pixels (WCAG 2.2)
